chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-484 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of MA No.5590/2016 08-04-2019 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Addl. P.G.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. It appears that after filing of this application, the applicant has lost his interest; therefore, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
